name: Bitmovin
description: Bitmovin — Cloud video encoding and playback API with per-minute pricing, AV1 support, and multi-DRM.

seo.title: Bitmovin — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Bitmovin: Bitmovin — Cloud video encoding and playback API with per-minute pricing, AV1 support, and multi-DRM.

when_to_use: Cloud video encoding with per-minute billing and AV1 support
Multi-DRM content protection for premium video platforms
Adaptive bitrate streaming with DASH/HLS packaging via API
HTML5 video player with analytics and subtitle support
Live transcoding at broadcast quality with redundancy

pros: AV1, HEVC, and multi-DRM support out of box
Strong player SDKs across web and native
Flexible deployment in your own cloud account
cons: Pricing climbs quickly at high volumes
Setup complexity higher than Mux or api.video
Analytics dashboard less polished than competitors
review.verdict: Serious codec flexibility for video engineering teams, probably too heavy for simple VOD use cases.
review.best_for: Streaming platforms needing AV1, per-title encoding, and BYOC deployment
review.not_for: Small teams that just want upload-and-embed video hosting

lock_in.reason: Video encoding API, standard formats output

developer_experience.reason: Rich APIs, players, SDKs, great docs
